name: Daydream / Scope
description: APIs for building interactive AI experiences — from real-time video to AI-generated worlds and beyond. Scope enables creative technologists to use remote inference for real-time video manipulation.

name: Streamplace
description: The video layer for decentralized social networks. Open-source infrastructure for high-quality video on the AT Protocol.

name: Embody
description: Embodied AI avatars for real-time tutoring, telepresence, and branded content powered by Livepeer infrastructure.

name: Frameworks
description: Stream without the cloud. A next-generation video platform delivering broadcast-quality streaming directly on Livepeer's open GPU network.
